name: Pay-Per-Use-AI

methods.name: create
methods.desc: Initialize the contract. Sets owner, fee, and seeds default services.

methods.name: deposit
methods.desc:
User deposits ALGO into contract escrow.
Must be grouped with a payment transaction to the contract address. Returns new balance.

methods.name: get_balance
methods.desc: Returns the escrow balance for a given wallet address.

methods.name: end_session_and_withdraw
methods.desc: User manually ends their session and withdraws all unspent ALGO from their escrow.

methods.name: auto_refund_session
methods.desc:
Backend (owner) automatically refunds an expired session.
Returns unspent ALGO directly to the user's wallet.

methods.name: start_session
methods.desc:
User authorizes a session with a max spend limit and expiry.
Requires sufficient existing escrow balance.

methods.name: request_service_v2
methods.desc:
Backend calls this to deduct for an AI service using the user's active session.
Contract validates balance and session expiry, deducts cost, and splits revenue. Emits event for backend to proceed with execution.

methods.name: log_proof
methods.desc:
Stores an immutable proof-of-intelligence hash on-chain.
Only callable by the contract owner (backend oracle). Returns the proof ID.

methods.name: mint_nft
methods.desc:
Mints an ARC-69 NFT via inner transaction.
Ownership assigned directly to the receiver (user wallet). Only callable by contract owner (backend oracle after AI generation). Returns the new asset ID.

methods.name: register_service
methods.desc:
Register a new AI service in the marketplace.
Only callable by contract owner (governance).

methods.name: update_price
methods.desc: Update service price. Only the service creator or contract owner can update.

methods.name: get_earnings
methods.desc: Returns accumulated earnings for a creator.

methods.name: withdraw_earnings
methods.desc:
Creator withdraws all accumulated earnings via inner payment transaction.
Returns amount withdrawn.

methods.name: get_service_price
methods.desc: Returns the price of a service. Returns 0 if not found.

methods.name: set_platform_fee
methods.desc: Set the platform fee percentage (0-100). Owner only.

methods.name: withdraw
methods.desc: Owner withdraws ALGO from the contract balance.

methods.name: purchase_access
methods.desc:
Legacy method — validates direct payment for a service.
Kept for backward compatibility with existing frontend.

desc:
Algorand smart contract enforcing pay-per-use AI services.

    Trust model:
      - All user funds held in contract escrow (BoxMap balances)
      - Service prices and creator ownership stored on-chain
      - Revenue split enforced by contract logic
      - Backend cannot move funds or grant access
